title: PluginConfig
description: User's plugin configuration, stored at .overture/config.yaml in the repo. Read by every skill at invocation. Plugin-v2 MVP fields only. If file missing, skills use defaults + prompt user to create.

locale.description: Language for prompts, AskUserQuestion options, and generated output. Overrides skill defaults.

boss.description: Configured Boss (stakeholder) for /overture:boss. Optional — skill offers generic fallback if absent.

mbti_code.description: MBTI 4-letter code. Must match an entry in data/boss-types.yaml.

name.description: Display name of the boss. e.g., '박 팀장' or 'Alex'. Can be free-form.

gender.description: Affects prompt pronouns in Korean mode.

max_agents_override.description: Override stakes-based agent count limit. Use with care.

preferred_agents.description: Agent IDs to prefer when scores are close. Soft signal.

commit_sessions.description: If true, status skill suggests committing .overture/sessions/ changes at phase=complete.
